title: Social Lead
subtitle: On-Court & Off-Court Welcoming
heading: Social Lead (Doubles Tennis & Pub Socials)
description: Help us run our popular weekend social doubles sessions for beginners/improvers. This role is about creating a fun, inclusive environment and managing player rotations smoothly.
details: Focus: On-court setup, ice-breakers, managing player sign-ins and rotation.
Time Commitment: 3 hours per week (usually on a Sunday afternoon).
Ideal For: Energetic, social players who love meeting new people and keeping things moving.

title: Vice Chair & Secretary
subtitle: Governance & Strategy
heading: Vice Chair & Secretary (Governance)
description: This is the most critical role, shaping the league's direction and ensuring longevity and fairness. You will be instrumental in making key decisions.
details: Participate in decisions shaping league philosophy and structure
Formal Records: Maintaining electronic copies of all official documents, including the TNC Constitution and Rules.
Committee Meetings: Attending and formally minuting all Management Committee meetings (required at least twice per year).
Maintain confidentiality and follow the Data Processing Policy (Section 9).
Act as primary contact for Volkl UK & future partners and coordinate non-monetary prize agreements.
Responsible for managing volunteers for different roles - Social Media, Marketing & Social engagement
Time Commitment: Approximately 1-2 hours per week.
Ideal For: Experienced community leaders, or individuals with strong organizational skills.

title: Marketing & Content
subtitle: Social Media & Newsletter
heading: Marketing and Content Creator
description: Elevate the brand's profile! We need someone passionate about tennis and social media to manage our online presence and communication.
details: Focus: Creating engaging content (photos/videos), writing short newsletters, and managing tennisnerds social accounts.
Time Commitment: Flexible, approximately 2-3 hours per week.
Ideal For: Creative individuals with experience in digital communication or content marketing.

title: Ad-Hoc Support
subtitle: Data Entry & Logistics
heading: Ad-Hoc Administrative Support
description: Perfect for quick contributions! This role involves taking on short-term tasks that keep the league running smoothly behind the scenes.
details: Focus: Short-term tasks such as data entry, occasional flyer design, or venue coordination.
Time Commitment: Varies greatly, perfect for contributing when you have spare time.
Ideal For: Detail-oriented people who prefer defined, non-continuous tasks.
